Monthly performance summary — key metrics month by month; ▲▼ compares the latest complete month to the one before.

⚠️ Watchlist — needs attention — on the Jan–May total, settled orders. After-ads = includes own-team rebate − GMV ad spend.

Monthly trend — gross, net sales, settlement & margin

Sales waterfall (this period)

Net sales = gross − cancelled − returns/refunds (before TikTok fees). Refund figures come from settled orders.

Payment method

Top states

Cancellation reasons

New vs returning orders

Operations & fulfillment (this period) — time from order to ship/delivery, and who cancels.

Repeat-purchase cohorts — % of each month's NEW buyers who ordered again in later months. Darker = stickier.

Most returned products — by refund value (all months)

Dead & low stock — capital tied up / stock-out risk

Sales dissection — Own team vs Real affiliate (by attributed GMV · Own team = your in-house affiliate accounts + seller LIVE/video/product-card; Real affiliate = external creators. Source: TikTok Product Card Data.)

Top external (real) affiliate creators — by GMV this period

Content format — GMV by month (LIVE / Video / Product card · seller + creator combined · Product Card Data)

Content-format GMV share (this period)

Product funnel (this period) — impressions → clicks → add to cart → orders, across all products (TikTok Product Card Data).

Top products by main SKU — sales, net margin & margin after ads — settled orders; net margin = settlement − COGS + own-team rebate (same basis as the drill-down). Click a column to sort. Avg sold = your promo price (original − seller discount), before TikTok vouchers.

Product drill-down by main SKU — pick a product to see its promo-price mix (% on the ring) and economics. Price = original − seller discount.

All products — monthly summary — units, sales & net-margin-after-ads % per main SKU, month by month (scroll right →).

Channel sales distribution by SKU — attributed GMV by content format (LIVE / Video / Product card) per main SKU, for the selected month/Total above. Click any column to sort.
